name: audit_trails_v1
description: Governance audit trail training data covering event recording, audit queries, compliance reporting, forensic investigation, and audit integrity. Encodes the full adapterOS audit system: microsecond-precision event capture, RBAC-aware actor tracking, correlation-based request tracing, append-only immutable storage with hash-chain integrity, and multi-tenant retention policies from 90-day defaults through 7-year compliance holds.

entries.notes: 2500 examples: 500 event recording, 500 audit queries, 500 compliance reporting, 500 forensic investigation, 500 audit integrity. Shuffled across subcategories.

fields.actor_id: user, service, or system principal identifier
fields.actor_role: RBAC role at time of action
fields.resource_type: adapter | dataset | training_run | stack | policy | config | model
fields.correlation_id: links related events across the request lifecycle

retention_policies.integrity: SHA-256 hash chain with periodic Merkle root verification

provenance.review_notes: Synthetic dataset covering full audit lifecycle from event capture through compliance reporting and forensic investigation. All examples grounded in adapterOS action taxonomy and audit record schema.

evaluation_gates: All event recording examples include complete audit record with all required fields
All audit queries translate natural language to precise field-level filters
Compliance reports reference specific audit fields and time ranges
Forensic investigations follow correlation chains across multiple events
Integrity examples describe specific tamper-detection mechanisms with technical detail
Negative examples correctly identify audit failures (missing fields, broken chains, tampered records)
All timestamps use microsecond precision in ISO-8601 or epoch-microsecond format
Multi-tenant examples enforce strict tenant_id isolation in all queries and reports
Hash chain examples include concrete SHA-256 digests and verification procedures
